api.description: Backend API routes for test management and execution

ui.description: Frontend pages and layouts for the testing dashboard and results

worker.description: Background worker process for executing tests asynchronously

ai.description: AI-powered utilities for DOM analysis, test planning, and result summarization

executor.description: Orchestrates the execution of tests in the browser

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol tools and browser interaction primitives

queue.description: Task queuing utilities for background processing

storage.description: Storage mechanisms for test reports, screenshots, and videos
